title: Opinion: Opinion | Why Pakistan Is Becoming Harder To Isolate - Despite India's Push
summary_full: Pakistan's willingness to sell itself to the highest bidder explains its curious positioning in the world. India's only option now is to get creative as it tries to isolate it globally.
summary_public: Pakistan's willingness to sell itself to the highest bidder explains its curious positioning in the world. India's only option now is to get creative as it tries to isolate it globally.
